findings.title: Dependency confusion: internal package found on PUBLIC registry (higher version present)
findings.detail: acme-auth is listed as internal, but a public npm package exists (latest=3.1.0, 12 versions). Risk score: 14
findings.recommendation: Pin acme-auth to the exact internal version in package.json and force the scope to your private registry via .npmrc.

findings.title: Dependency confusion: internal package found on PUBLIC registry
findings.detail: billing-core is listed as internal, but a public pypi package exists (latest=0.9.1, 3 versions). Risk score: 9
findings.recommendation: Pin billing-core to the internal build and restrict it to the private index using --index-url.

findings.title: Possible typosquatting of internal package
findings.detail: acme-shared-utlis looks suspiciously similar to internal package 'acme-shared-utils'.
findings.recommendation: Verify that 'acme-shared-utlis' is the correct package and not a typosquat of 'acme-shared-utils'.

findings.title: No registry scope configuration found
findings.detail: No npm registry config (.npmrc) detected in project root to protect internal packages.
findings.recommendation: Add a registry config file to scope 'acme-auth' to your private registry.

findings.title: No registry scope configuration found
findings.detail: No pypi registry config (pip.conf) detected in project root.
findings.recommendation: Add pip.conf to scope billing-core to your private index.
